_comment: Ratchet for window/entity-specific literals leaking into GENERIC contract-ui components. Fails ONLY IF the count grows; the target is 0, reached gradually. Pay debt down by declarativizing leaks (see docs/reports/contract-ui-churn-analysis.md §8), then run `node cli/src/window-leak-budget.js --update`. Comments are ignored; string/JSX literals are scanned. Baseline 8 maps to L1 (custom: icons ×2), L2 (=== 'contact' ×1), L3 (field === 'product' ×4), L4 (internal-consumption-product ×1).
